name: Adani Transmission Limited
summary: Adani Transmission Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the generation, transmission, and distribution of power in India. The company operates through Transmission, Trading, and Mumbai GTD Business segments. It builds, commissions, operates, and maintains electric power transmission systems; and distributes electricity in the suburbs of Mumbai. The company operates and maintains approximately 11,576 circuit kilometers of transmission lines with a total transformation capacity of 18,330 mega volt ampere in the states of Gujarat, Maharashtra, Rajasthan, Madhya Pradesh, Uttar Pradesh, Bihar, Jharkhand, Haryana, and Chhattisgarh. In addition, it engages in the trading of agri commodities. The company was incorporated in 2013 and is headquartered in Ahmedabad, India. Adani Transmission Limited is a subsidiary of S.B. Adani Family Trust.
